scripts.deploy:cf: opennextjs-cloudflare build && cp -r .open-next/assets/. .open-next/ && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/_worker.js && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.open-next/_routes.json', JSON.stringify({version:1,include:['/*'],exclude:['/_next/static/*','/_next/image*','/favicon.ico','/images/*','/robots.txt','/sitemap*.xml']}))" && wrangler pages deploy .open-next
scripts.preview:cf: opennextjs-cloudflare build && cp -r .open-next/assets/. .open-next/ && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/_worker.js && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.open-next/_routes.json', JSON.stringify({version:1,include:['/*'],exclude:['/_next/static/*','/_next/image*','/favicon.ico','/images/*','/robots.txt','/sitemap*.xml']}))" && wrangler pages dev .open-next
